## What this PR does

Describe what the code now does from a user's perspective — what the
client can do that it couldn't before. Open with a verb (e.g. "Wires
the `trace_cell` tool ...", "Caps the run sandbox at ..."). Flag
breaking changes here; otherwise omit a separate section.

## Files Modified

List one file per line. No bullets, no commas.

## How to test

```bash
# commands a reviewer can run locally to verify the change
python -m pytest tests/path/to/test_file.py -v
```
